# Codeindex — High-Blast Hotspots

This file is auto-generated by the dark factory after each implementation run.
**Do not edit manually** — changes will be overwritten.

To regenerate locally:
```bash
pip install "git+https://github.com/scheidydude/codeindex.git"
codeindex analyze .
codeindex high-blast > docs/codeindex-hotspots.md
```
